caption: In a large ballroom with high ceilings, recessed lighting, and a blue carpeted floor, multiple couples engage in dance. In the background, guests sit at tables draped with white and red cloths. One couple in the foreground consists of a woman wearing a light-colored, long-sleeved outfit and a man wearing a black sleeveless shirt and blue jeans. As the sequence progresses, the man leads the woman through a series of dance movements, rotating her and shifting his position. To their left, another couple dances, with the woman dressed in a white long-sleeved top and white trousers. The lighting remains consistent across the scene, and no text or logos are visible. The movement is fluid, with the foreground couple transitioning from a close hold to a more open position as the man guides the woman across the blue floor.
